productDisplayName: Biotique Bio Coco Butter Tissue Firming Body Balm
description: Biotique Bio Coco Butter Tissue Firming Body Balm, is enriched with pure cocoa butter, mustard oil, the bark of the arjun tree and Indian butter, to give the body a firmer, more toned appearance, nourishes skin and helps reduce the look of scars and stretch marks with regular use.
